meaning: n.Diana 所爱的猎人,[天]猎户星座
examples: If you can find Orion, you might be able to find the Winter Hexagon.
Orion had the habit of staring motionlessly at his interlocutor.
Orion believes that everyone wins this race.
However, the new Ares-Orion vehicle is not expected to be ready until at least 2015.
Valuable data could be collected with an NEO trial run, particularly testing Orion's high-speed heat shields.
